title: juncus usitatus
intro: Juncus usitatus, also known as rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus usitatus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Juncus usitatus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to promote healing and relieve symptoms.
